Thank you for your feedback on Kastor's gameplay experience. We will make some improvements to Kastor as soon as possible to make his Black Feather gameplay more interesting. The following are the contents we are currently changing and testing internally. Please refer to the official announcement for the final result.

The total amount of all erosions applied is doubled, but the proportion of self-damage bonus provided by the erosion amount is halved. In this way, Kastor's own damage remains unchanged, but the erosion becomes more meaningful. Generally speaking, in the late game, it is better to burst out super high damage in a single round than to cause a certain amount of damage in each round. Kastor's erosion should be able to change this and make it a valid choice to attack at ordinary times. ,
Extreme burst can make the Black Feather in the hand not played in this round, and it can get an extra shield at the end of the round, so that not playing the Black Feather is also a valid choice. ,
The first Black Feather in each round will provide Kastor with 10 points of Madness, so as to encourage him to form a strategy of playing one per round. ,

Ultimately we hope that all three strategies for Castor's Black Feather will become feasible: play all in a single round to achieve direct damage contributors during special periods, play one card every round to achieve stable damage gainers, and try not to play to fully utilize Black Feather's defensive capabilities.
Castor buff ละ
